main.description: View moderation reports. Reports are individual instances of content being reported, as opposed to subject statuses which aggregate reports at the subject level.

queueId.description: Filter by queue ID. Use -1 for unassigned reports.

reportTypes.description: Filter by report types (fully qualified string in the format of com.atproto.moderation.defs#reason<name>).

subject.description: Filter by subject DID or AT-URI.

subjectType.description: If specified, reports of the given type (account or record) will be returned.

collections.description: If specified, reports where the subject belongs to the given collections will be returned. When subjectType is set to 'account', this will be ignored.

reportedAfter.description: Retrieve reports created after a given timestamp

reportedBefore.description: Retrieve reports created before a given timestamp

isMuted.description: Filter by muted status. true returns only muted reports, false returns only unmuted reports. Defaults to false.

reviewedBy.description: Filter by moderator who reviewed/actioned the report

assignedTo.description: Filter by the DID of the moderator permanently assigned to the report.
